hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: Use conventional commit format (type(scope): subject). Run pnpm commit for guided creation.'
echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed. Use regular push or create a new commit.' && exit 1
echo 'Component file created/modified. Remember to: 1) Export from index.ts 2) Add Storybook stories 3) Consider tests'
echo 'Component modified. Consider updating: 1) Storybook stories 2) Tests 3) Exports if props changed'

cd /Users/ilyapashkov/Projects/wallarm/wallarm-design-system && if git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'packages/design-system/src/'; then echo 'Design system files were modified. Run quality checks before committing: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:run'; fi
